goal: support Avaritia-style creative wand behavior with infinite vis semantics
validated_concepts: wand component data remains compatible with normal rod/cap flow
arcane crafting cost bridge can distinguish finite and infinite vis sources
notes: This report documents the infinite-vis behavior surface expected by later arcane crafting and wand usage checks.
Runtime balancing and integration with external Avaritia content remains optional and should be guarded when the dependency is absent.
